subject: Three goblins run across an open landscape; the central one is large and carries a barrel on its shoulder, while two smaller ones flank it each carrying their own barrels
description: Three goblins are depicted in motion across a warm amber and grey outdoor landscape. The central figure is notably larger and more muscular, hoisting a wooden barrel on one shoulder and running with a sly grin. To its left a smaller goblin carries a similar barrel at chest height. To its right another small goblin looks back over its shoulder, apparently worried or conspiratorial. Pine trees and mountains are visible in the soft background. The palette is warm earth tones throughout — tan skin, grey-blue sky, golden grass. The flavour text's implication of hidden explosives fits the smug body language perfectly.
foreground: three goblins running, two small and one large, each carrying wooden barrels
